use_cases: Displaying time-series data points with customizable symbol markers on a chart
Creating scatter-style visualizations with multiple glyph shapes for dashboards
Building data visualization components for analytics interfaces
ai_summary: A data visualization component that renders a line chart with various glyph shapes (circles, crosses, diamonds, stars, triangles, squares, wye) as data point markers. Built with visx libraries, it features a modern purple and cyan color scheme and uses scaleTime and scaleLinear for axis mapping. Suitable for dashboards and analytics displays in SaaS and data-focused applications.
